title: Greg Gorden
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Greg Gorden''' is a writer and game designer. He contributed to several books for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[West End Games]].

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
===''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game''===
*[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] (credited with "Heroic and Meritorious Service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]")
*''[[The Star Wars Rules Companion]]''
*[[Otherspace (adventure)|''Otherspace'']] (editor)
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (West End Games)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] (editor)
*''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''
*[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']] (editor)
*''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition]]'' (credited with "Original Design" and "Additional Design")
*''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' (credited with "Original Force Power Design")
*''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' (credited, along with [[Greg Costikyan]], with "Additional Design" for the [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] "[[Contort/escape]]," "[[Force of will]]," and "[[Shift sense]]")
*''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' (credited with "original design")

===Fiction===
Three vignettes originally published in the ''Imperial Sourcebook'' have been reprinted by [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]:

*''[[Death of a Rebel Base]]''
*''[[Imperial Spin]]''
*''[[Admiral Jerjerrod's Testimony]]''

==Other notable works==
===Roleplaying games===
*''James Bond 007'' (credited as "System Developer")
*''Torg'' (credited with "Concept and Design")
*''DC Heroes Role-Playing Game, 3rd Ed.'' (credited with "Design")
*''Earthdawn'' (credited with "Design" and "Concepts")

===Fiction===
*''Prophecy'', an ''Earthdawn'' novel
*"Of Blood and Time," collected in the ''Earthdawn'' short-story collection ''Talisman''

{{Author-stub}}
